author: mark
text:
doctor tests: drop redundant symlink repoint in master_url_repo fixture

bl-eb76's master_url_repo() helper manually repointed .balls/tasks because pre-bl-773e bl remaster --commit left a stale legacy target. bl-773e (a4a3314) shipped during bl-eb76's review and taught ensure_tasks_symlink to repoint on its own, so the workaround is now a no-op and its 'until bl-773e teaches...' comment misrepresents history. All 7 master_url tests still pass against the unaided remaster flow.
